an2.5:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, I have personally known two things: non-contentment in regard to wholesome qualities and indefatigability in striving.I strove indefatigably,resolved: ‘Willingly, let only my skin, sinews, and bones remain, and let the flesh and blood dry up in my body, but I will not relax my energy so long as I have not attained what can be attained by manly strength, energy, and exertion.’It was by heedfulness that I achieved enlightenment, bhikkhus; it was by heedfulness that I achieved the unsurpassed security from bondage.
